title: Bridge Essay: Electrophysiological and Behavioural Markers of Novice State Mindfulness in Relation to Trait Mindfulness, Values, Personality Traits and Academic Dispositions.
concept: Visionary experience as real encounter — neurophenomenology of mystical states, cosmic consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary experience as real encounter — neurophenomenology of mystical states, cosmic consciousness.

**Electrophysiological and Behavioural Markers of Novice State Mindfulness in Relation to Trait Mindfulness, Values, Personality Traits and Academic Dispositions.** - Annals of neurosciences (2025). DOI: 10.1177/09727531251369287. PMID: 40933789. BACKGROUND: Modern integrative frameworks such as the self-awareness, self-regulation and self-transcendence (S-ART) and LIBRE/EMC Modern integrative frameworks such as the self-awareness, self-regulation and self-transcendence (S-ART) and LIBRE/EMC 2  highlight the neurocognitive-affective mechanisms underpinning mindfulness in young learners.
